entries.name: Screenplay Mode
entries.description: Courier Prime, element inference, Tab cycling, minute estimate — for screenplay-medium projects.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Comic Rail
entries.description: PAGE/PANEL structure aids and a page-flow rail showing panel rhythm — for comic-medium projects.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Story Canvas
entries.description: A node canvas over graph.json with a walk mode — for interactive-medium projects.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Medium Exporters
entries.description: Fountain, Final Draft FDX, screenplay PDF, comic script, Ren'Py, Twee — medium serializations.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Structure Wizards
entries.description: Guided outline generators — Snowflake, Save the Cat, Hero's Journey — that scaffold a project's tree.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Sprints
entries.description: A writing-sprint timer with session stats — words per sprint, best streak, today's totals.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Namesmith
entries.description: A name generator with seeded culture and style lists. No network, all forge.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio

entries.name: Stats Deluxe
entries.description: Charts dashboard: writing pace, word heatmaps, per-entity screen time.
entries.author: Lablooms Studio
